name: auto-provision-ssh
description: Connect to the localhost SSH proxy as an unknown principal, verify the guest boots on first contact, and prove a second SSH session reuses the same running guest.

steps.command: /bin/sh -lc 'test "$(whoami)" = joe && test "$(hostname)" = motlie-joe && test -f /workspace/boot-id && test "$(cat /proc/sys/kernel/random/boot_id)" = "$(cat /workspace/boot-id)" && echo REUSED_OK'
